message:
fix(dolt): always apply server connection defaults in applyConfigDefaults

Since New() now always uses server mode, the server defaults (host,
port, user, password) must be applied unconditionally. Previously
guarded by if cfg.ServerMode, which left callers that do not set
ServerMode=true without defaults (connecting to :0 with no user).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
